description_text: Store Categories UK Car Front lip Rear lip Side lip Fender Rear Tail Wing Roof Cross Bar Cargo Bag Steering Wheel Cover Car Cover Accessories Car Light Kit Seat Covers Cargo Net Car Antenna Car Floor Mats Car Resonator Sound Deadening Mat Exhaust Pipe Rim Cover UK Motorcycle mirror Seat Tail lights Decorative Light Hand Grip Turn Lights Windshield Hand Guard Headlight Highway Foot Pegs Handlebar Tube License Plate Bracket Other Parts Motorcycle Cover Payment info Universal Car Carbon Fiber Black Rear Bumper Lip Spoiler Splitter Diffuser Fin Items Description Notice: The rear diffuser shark fin installed at the bottom of the rear bumper of the car, the exhaust pipe cannot be in the middle. If the car model has dual exhaust pipes, the distance between the exhaust pipes should be greater than 86 cm. Specification: Condition: 100% Brand New Material: PP Colour: Carbon Fiber Black Style: Shark Fin Style, with LED Brake Light Size(L*W*H): 860*157*70 mm / 33.86*6.18*2.76 inch Feature: with LED Brake Light: The LED brake light rear diffuser can significantly improve the vehicle's recognition when braking at night through its unique lighting design, making the vehicle stand out in the traffic and look more dynamic and fashionable, satisfying the owner's pursuit of vehicle personalization, increasing the clear visibility of the rear driver, and keeping a distance from your car to ensure your driving safety. Premium Material: Our universal car spoiler rear bumper diffuser is made of high quality PP for superior durability and long-lasting performance, not easy to break. Our rear bumper diffuser is built through strict quality control. Excellent Appearance: Car rear bumper diffuser spoiler lip has shark fin diffuser kit and clean lines design, beautiful appearance, personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Reduce Air Resistance: This shark fin diffuser designed to increase a vehicle's aerodynamic performance. Reduces car's drag about 1.6% and increases down force.Reduce the airflow into the bottom, improve the steady of vehicle during fast driving. Easy Installation: Install with screws (need drilling holes) or with adhesive double sided tape, but professional installation is still recommend. Package Included: 1 x Rear Bumper Lip Spoiler Diffuser 1 x Double Sided Adhesive Tape 10 x Screws Shipping Payment Return Policy Feedback About us We usually ship the item within 1 business day after payment clear. (Excluding Weekends and Public Holidays). All shipping including postage and handling fees. We have warehouse in UK, the item will be dispatched from UK warehouse. Delivery to UK typically takes around 2-3 business days. (Except holidays and special circumstances)
